sections.paragraph:
fut. יִקְבֹּר to bury one, Gen 23:4, 19 Gen 23:19 25:9 more, Eze 39:12 i.q. Piel (Arab., Aram., Eth. id. The primary idea is that of heaping up a mound; see Nasor. קבר to heap up; compare צָבַר. The biliteral stock is קב; compare קָבַב, קָבַע; compare גַּב, גָּבַב).

Niphal, pass, Rth 1:17 Jud. 8:32 .

Piel, to bury several (comp. קָטַל and קִטֵּל, Lehrg. 241), Num 33:4 1Ki 11:15 Jerem. 14:16 Eze 39:14 Hos 9:6.

Pual, pass., Gen 25:10.

Hence קְבוּרָה and-
